title: antennaria neodioica var. randii
intro: Antennaria neodioica var. randii is a variety of the Antennaria plant, commonly known as Mountain or Rocky Mountain Snowy Arnica, a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Antennaria neodioica var. randii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in tinctures and ointments for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
